problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: If Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
